title: More Carpets
description: This mod adds around 240 new Carpets and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Carpets. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new carpets you must first create the Carpet Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any carpet from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Carpet Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Carpets emit light like their respective blocks. The color of the beam of the beacon can be changed by glass carpets. From a crafting you can obtained four carpets. The glazed terracotta carpets are directional, so you could make the usual 2x2 patterns. Thanks to MisterEcho for the review: https://youtu.be/ISqDfYnSpv4?t=162

Some Carpets

Carpet Frame

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 4 carpets)

Gilded Blackstone Carpet

Magma Block Carpet

Diamond Block Carpet

Glass Blue Carpet (All types of glass are present)

Special Carpets

For some carpets you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Carpet, Fire Soul Carpet, Lava Carpet (2 version), Nether Carpet and Strange Carpet (no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
